entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The long-term shift in global or regional climate patterns and variability

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: The variation in climate patterns over time

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The patterns and methods of growing crops on a piece of land

entities.name: HOST
entities.description: A susceptible plant organism that can be infected by a pathogen

entities.name: PATHOGEN
entities.description: A virulent organism capable of causing disease in a host

entities.name: FAVOURABLE ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: Environmental conditions that promote the development and spread of plant diseases

entities.name: DISEASE EPIDEMICS
entities.description: The rapid spread of plant diseases across a range of crops

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Agricultural plants grown for food or other purposes

entities.name: DISEASE TETRAHEDRAN
entities.description: A model describing the interaction of a virulent pathogen, a susceptible host, favourable environment, and evolutionary forces over time leading to disease epidemics

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of generating food through agricultural activities

entities.name: RAINFED REGIONS
entities.description: Agricultural areas that rely solely on rainfall for water

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where rainfed regions constitute about 65% of the area under cultivation
